lines.speaker: Dwarven Boatman
lines.text: Ho there, human!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: [player name].

lines.speaker: Dwarven Boatman
lines.text: Ho there, [player name]! Want to take a ride with me?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where are you going? Across the river?

lines.speaker: Dwarven Boatman
lines.text: No no, that's what the ferryman is for! I'm going to Keldagrim, my home!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How much will that cost me then?

lines.speaker: Dwarven Boatman
lines.text: For a human like you, I can do it for free!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's a deal!

lines.speaker: Dwarven Boatman
lines.text: Excellent! I'm just waiting for my ship to arrive and then we can go.

lines.speaker: Dwarven Boatman
lines.text: Mind, this trip could take a few minutes! Are you sure you're ready to go as well?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, I'm ready and don't mind it taking a few minutes.

lines.speaker: Dwarven Boatman
lines.text: Well, let's not waste any more time then!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I don't have time right now, I'll be back later.

lines.speaker: Dwarven Boatman
lines.text: Sure, sure! Come back when you need to!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I prefer the mines to the city.

lines.speaker: Dwarven Boatman
lines.text: Well, suit yourself then!

lines.speaker: Dwarven Boatman
lines.text: Hello again, [player name]! Want to go back to Keldagrim?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, please take me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What, on your ship? No way.

lines.speaker: Dwarven Boatman
lines.text: Hey, it was only a little accident! Calm down!

lines.speaker: Dwarven Boatman
lines.text: Want me to take you back to the mines?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, please take me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What, on your ship? No thanks! I don't want to crash into any more things!

lines.speaker: Dwarven Boatman
lines.text: Hey now, it was only a slight accident!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: A slight accident?? Thanks to you I have to rebuild this statue you so carelessly knocked over!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: A slight accident?? Have you any idea how much time I spent rebuilding that statue?

lines.speaker: Dwarven Boatman
lines.text: Calm down, calm down! You got what you paid for the trip, didn't you?
